conversations.content: Let's do some law exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Please explain using the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned the day before yesterday: Two Tauren got into a brawl near the totems in Thunder Bluff, how will they be punished according to the security regulations?

<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned the day before yesterday, Thunder Bluff security regulations, punishment for brawling near totems</content>

Related memory fragment: [mem-id:26] Time: 2026-10-19-11:10, Content: The user taught the public security regulations of Thunder Bluff, Azeroth. The core is that those who fight near the totems will be fined 30 gold coins each, and are forced to clean the altar for three days. Low relevance memory fragment: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 related entry, [mem-id:26] gives the punishment regulations for brawling near the totems in the Thunder Bluff security regulations. According to the rule, both parties involved in a brawl near the totems will be punished. The specific punishment is a fine of 30 gold coins each and forced cleaning of the altar for three days.
conversations.content: According to the Thunder Bluff security regulations, both parties will be fined 30 gold coins each and forced to clean the altar for three days.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
